arguments.argument:
mMap_Submenu=1 subMenu=4 textColorMain=make_color_rgb(240,240,240) textColorShadow=make_color_rgb(0,120,72) mMap_CurX=-1000 mMap_CurY=-1000 mMap_FrameCount=0 mMap_CurFrame=0 mSAP_FrameCount=0 mSAP_CurFrame=0 listFirst=-1 listLast=-1 for(i=0;i<=110;i+=1) { mapIndexCheck[i]=string_char_at(global.mapAreas,i) }
init=0 alarm[0]=1
